items.title: You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini
items.summary: Google is launching "switching tools" that, just as it sounds, will make it easier for users of other chatbots to switch to Gemini.

items.title: David Sacks is no longer the White House AI and Crypto Czar
items.summary: David Sacks, the venture capitalist and tech billionaire who'd become Silicon Valley's primary advocate inside the White House and a key architect of its aggressive AI policy initiatives, revealed on Thursday that he was no longer a special government employee - and therefore no longer President Don...

items.title: Anthropic Supply-Chain-Risk Designation Halted by Judge
items.summary: A judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration’s designation, clearing the way for Anthropic to keep doing business without the label starting next week.

items.title: Google Gemini now lets you import your chats and data from other AI apps
items.summary: Google is adding a pair of new features to Gemini aimed at making it easier to switch to the AI chatbot. Personal history and past context are big components to how a chatbot provides customized answers to each user. Gemini now supports importing history from other AI platforms. Both free and paid c...

items.title: Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer
items.summary: The stack: two agents on separate boxes. The public one (nullclaw) is a 678 KB Zig binary using ~1 MB RAM, connected to an Ergo IRC server. Visitors talk to it via a gamja web client embedded in my site. The private one (ironclaw) handles email and scheduling, reachable only over Tailscale via Googl...

items.title: We rewrote JSONata with AI in a day, saved $500k/year
items.summary: Article URL: https://www.reco.ai/blog/we-rewrote-jsonata-with-ai Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47536712 Points: 270 # Comments: 254

items.title: OpenAI ads pilot tops $100 million in annualized revenue in under 2 months
items.summary: OpenAI's nascent ads business has surpassed $100 million in annual recurring revenue less than two months after launching its pilot in the U.S.

items.title: Meta boosts investment in West Texas AI data center by over sixfold to $10 billion
items.summary: Meta is increasing investment at a data center in El Paso, Texas, to $10 billion from $1.5 billion, as the company ramps up spending on AI infrastructure.

items.title: David Sacks says his time as Trump's crypto and AI czar has ended
items.summary: The venture capitalist said he will still be a part of the White House's Technology committee and will help push Trump's AI plan forward.

items.title: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
items.summary: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

items.title: Google is making it easier to import another AI’s memory into Gemini
items.summary: After Anthropic updated its tool for copying another AI's memory into Claude earlier this month, Google Gemini is rolling out new "Import Memory" and "Import Chat History" features on desktop that can help users quickly copy over everything their current AI already knows about them. To use the "Impo...

items.title: Apple will reportedly allow other AI chatbots to plug into Siri
items.summary: Apple's iOS 27 update will allow users to choose the AI chatbot they want to link with Siri. That's according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, who says third-party chatbots downloaded from the App Store, like Google's Gemini or Anthropic's Claude, will be able to fetch replies for Siri - si...

items.title: Ugh, Netflix is raising prices
items.summary: Netflix is raising prices across all of its subscription tiers, according to an updated "Plans and Pricing" page spotted by Android Authority . The company last raised prices in January 2025, when the cost of all of its tiers were jacked up by $1 or more. As of this latest price hike, Netflix's ad-s...

items.title: Cramer says Meta is not the new tobacco, warns against selling over social media court rulings
items.summary: Jim Cramer dismisses Meta's underperformance amid child safety litigation — and instead, considers whether to buy more shares.

items.title: Judge tosses out X's advertiser boycott lawsuit
items.summary: A US District Court Judge for the Northern District of Texas has dismissed X Corp.’s lawsuit against advertisers it claimed participated in an “illegal boycott” of X, Reuters reports . X originally filed its lawsuit in 2024 in response to advertisers pulling ads from the social media platform, a dec...

items.title: OpenAI abandons yet another side quest: ChatGPT’s erotic mode
items.summary: It's only the latest of several side projects that the AI startup has ditched over the past week.

items.title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills
items.summary: Senators Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

items.title: Google begins rolling out Search Live globally
items.summary: Following a false start last week , Google has begun rolling out Search Live globally . The tool allows you to point your phone's camera at an object or scene and ask questions about what you see in front of you. With today's expansion, Google is making Search Live available in every location and la...

items.title: Meet the Tech Reporters Using AI to Help Write and Edit Their Stories
items.summary: Independent writers are using AI agents all throughout their reporting process. What’s the value of a human journalist, anyway?

items.title: Hades 2 is coming to Xbox Series X/S and PS5 on April 14
items.summary: If you’ve been (impatiently) waiting for Hades 2 to hit Xbox Series X/S and PS5 , there’s some great news for you coming out of Thursday’s Xbox Partner Preview showcase . Supergiant’s roguelite action RPG is coming to those consoles (as well as Xbox on PC and Xbox Cloud) on April 14. It’ll be availa...

items.title: Sanders and Ocasio-Cortez introduce a bill to pause US data center construction
items.summary: File this one under "things that might have a shot after the midterms." On Wednesday, Senator Bernie Sanders (I-VT) and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) introduced the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act. The bill would require an immediate pause on data center construction until ...

items.title: Wikipedia has banned AI-generated articles
items.summary: English Wikipedia has banned the use of generative AI when writing or rewriting articles. The platform says it came to this decision because using AI to whip up copy "often violates several of Wikipedia's core content policies." There are a couple of minor exceptions. Editors can use large language ...

items.title: Major outgoing CEOs are citing AI as a factor in their decisions to step down
items.summary: Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey and former Walmart CEO Doug McMillon have told CNBC that the next wave of artificial intelligence is a reason for their departures.

items.title: EU says Pornhub and others failed to stop minors accessing adult content
items.summary: The European Commission (EC) accused four porn platforms of not doing enough to prevent minors from accessing their content. In its preliminary findings of a 10-month investigation , the European Union's regulatory arm said Pornhub, Stripchat, XNXX and XVideos have breached the Digital Services Act ...

items.title: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet, report finds
items.summary: HUMAN Security's State of AI Traffic report found that bots have eclipsed human users, with automated traffic growing eight times faster than human activity.

items.title: ByteDance’s new AI video generation model, Dreamina Seedance 2.0, comes to CapCut
items.summary: The new model in CapCut will have built-in protections for making video from real faces or unauthorized intellectual property.

items.title: Conntour raises $7M from General Catalyst, YC to build an AI search engine for security video systems
items.summary: Conntour uses AI models to let security teams query camera feeds using natural language to find any object, person, or situation.

items.title: Cohere launches an open source voice model specifically for transcription
items.summary: Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages.

items.title: The Download: a battery pivot to AI, and rewriting math
items.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. items.title: A Google AI breakthrough is pressuring memory chip stocks from Samsung to Micron
items.summary: SK Hynix, Samsung and Micron shares fell as investors fear fewer memory chips may be required in the future.

items.title: A ‘pound of flesh’ from data centers: one senator’s answer to AI job losses
items.summary: Fears of AI-driven job loss are growing fast, and they’re fueling backlash against data centers. Sen. Mark Warner suggests taxing them to help workers survive the transition.

items.title: ‘She’s Never Going to Age’: Porn Stars Are Embracing AI Clones to Stay Forever Young
items.summary: AI companion platforms like OhChat and SinfulX are offering adult creators digital twins, who are always at their peak and stay monetizing.

items.summary: The best snow-forecasting app for skiers and snowboarders isn’t from any of the federally funded weather services. Nor from any of the big-name brands.
